WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
BRAZIL-SOUTHEAST COAST.
DNC 01.
1. UNDERWATER OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS 1100Z TO 2000Z
   DAILY UNTIL 30 MAY BY M/V ANGLO SAXON, M/V ZATTO
   M/V COMANDO-B IN 20-22.10S 040-08.90W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1283/19.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 312100Z MAY 19.
